description: Standalone secure PWA racing game prepared for Apex Vault Command Cloud static hosting.

securityHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
securityHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), xr-spatial-tracking=(), fullscreen=(self), gamepad=(self)

uploadChecklist: Upload VelocityVault-ApexVaultCommandCloud-StaticBundle.zip to https://apexvault.duckdns.org/ as a static web/PWA app.
Set index.html as the entry file and the deployment root as the uploaded folder root.
Require HTTPS so phone installation and service-worker offline play work correctly.
Enable SPA fallback to index.html for unknown paths.
Apply _headers or the equivalent security headers in this manifest.
After deployment, open the secure URL on a phone and use Add to Home Screen or Install.
